narrative: USD broadly offered as Middle East peace optimism drives risk-on sentiment — DXY retreats +0.13%. EUR/USD firms at 1.1767; GBP/USD holds near 1.3516. USD/JPY pressured at 158.58 as JPY's safe-haven function appears compromised; gold surges higher +1.48% on inflation hedge demand amid equity gains +1.20% and VIX at 17.5.
